data.title: Blackmagic Design Announces Fairlight Live
data.description: Fairlight Live has introduced a cutting-edge software live audio mixer in Las Vegas. This innovative technology offers spatial audio mixing and SMPTE-2110 broadcast workflows. The software is designed to enhance the audio experience during live events and broadcasts. This development signifies a major advance in the audio technology sector.

data.title: DECKED Launches New Payloader Storage Bins, the Last Storage Bin You’ll Ever Need
data.description: In Ketchum, Idaho, DECKED unveiled its Payloader collection, a series of robust storage bins aimed at replacing common flimsy totes found in American garages. The new line is built for individuals requiring frequent access to their equipment, allowing DECKED's renowned durability and organization to transition from truck beds to garages. The Payloader bins offer enhanced functionality and are designed to withstand wear and tear. This launch signifies a shift towards long-lasting and efficient storage solutions, with the goal of revolutionizing storage practices in households.

data.title: Iceland partners with invent.ai to transform inventory and replenishment operations
data.description: In the UK, a prominent supermarket chain, Iceland Foods, is utilizing AI-powered solutions to enhance their inventory management, ensuring shelves remain well-stocked. This initiative aims to minimize lost sales and optimize store operations. As of April 14, 2026, the company is implementing these technologies to improve efficiency and customer satisfaction.

data.title: ETS, Khan Academy and TED Announce New Institute to Reimagine Higher Education for the AI Age
data.description: Today at the TED conference in Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 14, 2026, the announcement was made about the establishment of the Khan TED Institute. This institute aims to enhance access to top-quality education and career opportunities. It has been created through collaborations with prominent companies such as Google, Microsoft, Accenture, Bain & Company, McKinsey, and Replit. The institute's primary objective is to provide a platform for individuals to access world-class learning resources and pathways for career advancement.

data.title: Blackmagic Design Announces DaVinci Resolve 21
data.description: In Las Vegas, DaVinci Resolve 21 has launched with several updates. The latest version includes a new Photo page, additional AI tools, fresh motion graphic effects, Fairlight folder tracks, and various other enhancements.

data.title: Qlik Brings Agentic Execution to Data Engineering
data.description: KISSIMMEE, Florida - Qlik is broadening its agentic execution approach to data engineering by launching new features that support teams in crafting, developing, and providing reliable data.

data.title: W. Capra Brings David Caudill on as Executive Consultant – Head of Technology
data.description: In Chicago, W. Capra, a leading consulting and services business, has appointed David Caudill as the Executive Consultant and Head of Technology. This addition was announced today. Mike Streams, a Partner at W. Capra, expressed excitement about Caudill joining the team, citing his successful leadership in significant digital transformations, particularly at bp. Streams emphasized the importance of innovative thinking and experienced leadership in staying competitive in convenience retail.

data.title: Oracle Stock Explodes 25% On AI Build‑Out, Bloom Energy Deal
data.description: Oracle Corp.'s stock, listed on the NYSE under ticker symbol ORCL, saw a significant surge on Tuesday morning as it redefined its standing from a legacy software rebound to an emerging AI utility story. The stock experienced a substantial climb of approximately 25% in just two sessions. This transformation was attributed to various factors such as new C-suite leadership, a substantial contractual backlog, and the implementation of green power infrastructure. Previously, concerns regarding heavy data-center capital expenditures and financial strain had created skepticism in the market. However, with the recent developments, investors have started to view Oracle in a more positive light, leading to a surge in stock value. The company's appointment of Hilary Maxson as the new Chief Financial Officer also played a crucial role in this upward trajectory. This move provided investors with confidence in Oracle's execution strategies and capital allocation. The market response has caused analysts to re-evaluate their stance on Oracle's position in the growing demand for AI infrastructure.
